text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Hmmm... Could we perhaps cut our meeting a
little short today?

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
One of my juniors seeks my advice, and I also
need to help the dorm keeper with something.
After that, there's the study session I need to—

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Ah... Apologies. As you can see, I'm quite the
busy bee.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Um... Please don't look at me like that. I assure
you I'm not overworking myself. I swear!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
...All right, I shall adjust my schedule. I certainly
don't wish to worry you any further.
